sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98570" key="sumparh/kw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπαρ-ήκω</orth>, <sense id="n98570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be present together with, accompany</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῷ αἰσθητῷ τὸ αἰσθανόμενον ς</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1024c</biblScope> </bibl> <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1032b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
